samples.text: Birds build nests to raise their young. Is this expected based on common sense?
Birds make nests for their offspring. Does this match everyday common sense?
Avians construct nests to rear their young. Is this expected based on common sense?
Raising young needs shelter. Birds build nests as that shelter. Is the described situation expected based on common sense?
Birds build nests to raise their young. There are several books on the shelf. Is this expected based on common sense?
